name: Utility and Configuration
summary: This cluster provides fundamental utility functions and guides related to system settings, environment variables, and advanced Python type handling.

name: Burger Data Management
summary: This cluster provides the core functionalities for retrieving, reading, and managing burger data, including sequential access and handling results.

name: Application Deployment and Management
summary: This cluster focuses on deploying and managing applications, specifically leveraging FastAPI within containerized environments like Docker, and handling the reading of application data or root objects.

name: Core Entity Management
summary: This cluster contains the fundamental classes and functions required for managing core entities within the system, including the main operational function, user definition, and feature definitions.

name: Item Management and Interaction
summary: This cluster manages the creation, retrieval, deletion, and manipulation of items within the system. It includes classes, functions, and utilities for handling item data, ownership, and associated state.
